title: phlox glabrata
intro: Phlox glabrata, also known as smooth phlox, is a perennial flowering plant native to the United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Phlox glabrata include its ability to reduce pain and inflammation, as well as its potential to aid in wound healing and the treatment of skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Herbal preparations of Phlox glabrata can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
